zh.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾萊坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert de Clifton於大約1242年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親William de Clifton41歲，母親Lady Ellen Warren34歲。他於1278年與Isabel de Aubigny在英國藍卡爾克里夫頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1278年在英國藍卡爾被列為high sheriff。他去世於1323年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾萊坦享年82歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾萊坦。

zh-hans.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: 英国英格兰藍卡爾萊坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert de Clifton于大约1242年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲William de Clifton41岁，母亲Lady Ellen Warren34岁。他于1278年与Isabel de Aubigny在英国藍卡爾克里夫頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1278年在英国藍卡爾被列为high sheriff。他去世于1323年在英国英格兰藍卡爾萊坦享年82岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾萊坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert de Clifton was born about 1242, in Lancashire, England, his father, William de Clifton, was 41 and his mother, Lady Ellen Warren, was 34. He married Isabel de Aubigny in 1278, in Clifton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1278, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Lancashire, England. He died in 1323, in Lytham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Lytham, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert de Clifton est né environ 1242, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Clifton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen Warren, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Aubigny en 1278, à Clifton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1278, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1323, à Lytham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Lytham, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert de Clifton um 1242 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Clifton 41 und seine Mutter Lady Ellen Warren 34. Er hat 1278 in Clifton, Lancashire, England Isabel de Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1278, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1323 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Lytham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lytham, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert de Clifton è nato il circa 1242 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William de Clifton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ellen Warren, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Aubigny nel 1278, nel Clifton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1278, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Lancashire, England. Morì nel 1323, nel Lytham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Lytham, Lancashire, England.

ja.Clifton, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアクリフトン
ja.Lytham, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアリサム
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリサム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Cliftonが約1242年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Cliftonは41歳，母Lady Ellen Warrenは34歳であった。1278年にイギリスランカシュアイアクリフトンでIsabel de Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1278年，37歳の時，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1323年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリサムで82歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアリサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de Clifton(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Clifton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen Warren(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1278년 영국 랭카실르 클리프턴에서 Isabel de Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1278년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리섬에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 리섬에 묻혔다.

mn.Lytham, Lancashire, England, United King: Lytham, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert de Clifton nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Clifton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen Warren, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Aubigny em 1278, em Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1278, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1323, em Lytham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Lytham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert de Clifton родился около 1242 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Clifton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Warren, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Aubigny в 1278 г. в местности клифтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1278 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер в 1323 г. в местности литам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности литам, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert de Clifton nació aproximadamente 1242, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Clifton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen Warren, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Isabel de Aubigny en 1278, en Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1278, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1323, en Lytham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Lytham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
